extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won a chaotic flat sprint from behind after late downhill negated leadout trains, passing BENNETT Sam in final 100m.
tactical_patterns: POZZATO Filippo attacked with 3.5km remaining, forcing sprinter teams to chase rather than organize traditional leadouts.
Late downhill before finish neutralized traditional leadout trains; riders positioning at crest proved more important than early sprint trains.
GAVIRIA Fernando demonstrated superior ability to navigate messy sprint from behind when leadouts fractured on technical finish.

rider_signals.POZZATO Filippo: positive: attacked solo at 3.5km in sprint stage showing opportunistic racing instincts despite being away from leadout duties
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: second consecutive runner-up finish suggests closing speed deficit despite superior positioning from team leadout
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: fourth stage win demonstrates ability to win from chaos when traditional sprint trains disintegrate
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: DNS indicates accumulated damage from earlier crashes, suggesting Sky mismanaged recovery after GC hopes ended
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: third place demonstrates Quick-Step can produce results without dedicated leadout on technical finishes
